description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City will sell six city-owned parcels in Yamate-cho through open competitive bidding.

【Properties for Sale】
1. Yamate-cho 211-1 Field 36.85㎡
2. Yamate-cho 211-3 Field 116.93㎡
3. Yamate-cho 211-4 Field 88.45㎡
4. Yamate-cho 1406-3 Residential land 87.57㎡
5. Yamate-cho 1407-4 Residential land 538.21㎡
6. Yamate-cho 1410-2 Residential land 171.97㎡

Minimum sale price: ¥68,000,000 (total for six parcels)
Bid security: ¥10,200,000
Zoning: First-class residential district

【Schedule】
Bid application period: May 22 – June 5, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
Bid date and time: June 19, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 2:00 p.m.
Bid venue: Hanno City Hall Main Building, 2nd floor, Bidding Room

Application documents are available on the Hanno City official website.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/shisankeieika/7334.html
summary: ℹ️ City-owned land sale (open competitive bidding)
